hero.text: Believe in the magic of new beginnings.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is a day to act on those bold ideas. Your energy is contagious and can inspire others.
aries.love: The sparks are flying; a chance encounter may blossom into something beautiful.
aries.career: Your leadership skills will shine today. Be ready to take charge and motivate your team.

taurus.general: Stability is key today. Focus on what makes you feel secure.
taurus.love: Seek comfort in familiar routines; it's a good day for deepening bonds.
taurus.career: Hard work will not go unnoticed. Focus on your goals.

gemini.general: Communication is in the spotlight today. Reach out and connect with others.
gemini.love: A heartfelt conversation will bring clarity to your relationship.
gemini.career: Your adaptability will work in your favor. Be open to new opportunities.

cancer.general: Listen to your intuition; it will guide you through personal challenges today.
cancer.love: Nurture your relationships; a small gesture will have a profound impact.
cancer.career: A collaborative effort will lead to success. Lean on your team.

leo.general: Your charisma is magnetic today, drawing people toward you.
leo.love: A fun date night will reignite passion in your relationship.
leo.career: Showcase your talents and don’t be afraid to shine.

virgo.general: Organization will bring peace of mind. Tackle that to-do list!
virgo.love: Appreciate the little things in your relationship; they'll mean the most.
virgo.career: Pay attention to details—one small oversight could turn into a bigger issue.

libra.general: Balance is key today. Strive to maintain harmony in your surroundings.
libra.love: A conflict may arise, but a willingness to compromise will resolve it.
libra.career: Network and strengthen connections. Teamwork is essential.

scorpio.general: Your intensity can lead to great insights today. Dive deep into your passions.
scorpio.love: An unexpected surprise could bring excitement in your romantic life.
scorpio.career: Use your intuition to navigate office politics; stay true to yourself.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls! Step out of your comfort zone to relish new experiences.
sagittarius.love: A spontaneous outing could lead to deepening your connection.
sagittarius.career: Engage in brainstorming sessions; your ideas are bound to stir up enthusiasm.

capricorn.general: Structure and discipline will bring progress. Stick to your plans.
capricorn.love: Open communication strengthens your bonds with loved ones.
capricorn.career: Recognition for your hard work is on the horizon; stay persistent.

aquarius.general: Innovation is your ally today. Think outside the box!
aquarius.love: A shared dream can bring you and your partner closer together.
aquarius.career: Bring your unique ideas to the table; they may lead to exciting changes.

pisces.general: Emotional depth is strong today; channel it into creativity or sharing.
pisces.love: A romantic gesture could turn today's normalcy into something magical.
pisces.career: Trust your instincts in decisions; they will steer you in the right direction.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Work hard in silence, let your success be your noise.
professional.author: Frank Ocean

professional.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
professional.author: Norman Vaughan

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Do more things that make you forget to check your phone.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day may not be good, but there's something good in every day.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Just because you're awake doesn't mean you should stop dreaming.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: The future is already here – it’s just not very evenly distributed.
tech.author: William Gibson

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

tech.text: The art challenges the technology, and the technology inspires the art.
tech.author: John Lasseter

fun.text: I’m on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and it froze.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
faith.author: Christian D. Larson

faith.text: Faith does not eliminate questions. But faith knows where to take them.
faith.author: Elisabeth Elliot

faith.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
faith.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The wise man will never be less than he is, and he who is steadfast will not fall.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, thou art like a chatterbox; speak less and listen more.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: With age comes wisdom, but sometimes age comes alone.
wisdom.author: Unknown
